//: NPCs placed on maps via object-layer entries (kind=npc, ref=<id>). 'dialogue' is the dialogue file id opened on interaction. glyph/color style the map token.

npcs.name: Elder Senna
npcs.desc: Keeper of Greyreach's charter and its last working voice of authority.

npcs.name: Old Tam
npcs.desc: Gatekeeper of the bell-gate, professionally suspicious of weather.

npcs.name: Maren Vael
npcs.desc: Quarry forewoman, out of a quarry. Arms like winch-cable.

npcs.name: Issi
npcs.desc: A Hollowed wanderer who hums songs with no sound in them.

npcs.name: Pell
npcs.desc: Greyreach's only remaining merchant, optimist, and gossip.
